programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 3.0m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 28.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 48.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 1.1m
📋 Onshore wind making it messy • Significant wind chop
